source: independent (non-author) pred-scout-coach-critic reviewing data/postgame/*.json coaching against the match facts; preference-based / ungrounded lines flagged; grounded rewrites applied back

0a84cd68-fd4f-4f26-98bc-994f2259fb43.quote: Wraith had the favored lane but Xeebs' damage (4/5 of the team) was magical into a comp where one magic-resist item blunts most of it — that's the comp flag, and it showed. The Vanquisher didn't come online until 36 min; Xeebs was under-tuned for the fights that mattered (14, 18.5, 23). Push for objectives the team can actually take instead of walking the full team into Legion's side, where these 5v5s kept going his way.
0a84cd68-fd4f-4f26-98bc-994f2259fb43.issue: attributes the team's 4/5-magical comp to Xeebs personally (re-voicing misattribution)
0a84cd68-fd4f-4f26-98bc-994f2259fb43.rewrite: Wraith had the favored lane but the team comp was 4/5 magical — one enemy magic-resist item blunts most of it; that's the comp flag, and it showed. The Vanquisher didn't come online until 36 min; Xeebs was under-tuned for the fights that mattered (14, 18.5, 23). Push for objectives the team can actually take instead of walking the full team into Legion's side, where these 5v5s kept going his way.

48f30566-4227-448b-9f12-c5f367907d06.quote: Nothing — bank it. The combo of Cuban carrying + Willy peeling + map control is our formula.
48f30566-4227-448b-9f12-c5f367907d06.rewrite: Nothing — bank it. The combo of Sparrow carrying + Willy peeling + map control is our formula.

aef54c5d-6385-4bd7-9824-b289f13253e5.quote: Gadget went 1/7 — 7 deaths into a game decided early. Willy Guggenheim was in the 11.7, 20.2 and 26.6 losses. A ranged mid's damage should come from the back; getting caught that often means being too far forward in fights the team couldn't win. Poke and reposition, don't trade bodies.
aef54c5d-6385-4bd7-9824-b289f13253e5.issue: macro has Willy ahead-in-lane and absent at 20.2, not in that fight
aef54c5d-6385-4bd7-9824-b289f13253e5.rewrite: Gadget went 1/7 — 7 deaths into a game decided early, including solo catches at 9.1 and 22.1. At 20.2 Willy Guggenheim was ahead in lane and absent from the fight, and the 22.6 fight opened 4v5 29 seconds after Willy fell. A ranged mid's damage should come from the back; poke and reposition, don't trade bodies.

c574a71e-39f1-4e74-9071-f7b4a9125761.quote: We won the early objective count (10-6) and still lost in 17 minutes because we converted none of it to structures (0 towers). That's the inverse of our wins: take the Fangtooth, then PUSH as a five. The macro shows the real bleed — our offlane never joined the 13.8 and 16.5 fights and the bot lanes were pinned, so we kept fighting a body short.
c574a71e-39f1-4e74-9071-f7b4a9125761.issue: source reads 16.5 as a 5v4 in our favor, not a body short
c574a71e-39f1-4e74-9071-f7b4a9125761.rewrite: We won the early objective count (10-6) and still lost in 17 minutes because we converted none of it to structures (0 towers). That's the inverse of our wins: take the Fangtooth, then PUSH as a five. The macro shows the real bleed — our offlane never joined the 13.8 and 16.5 fights while the bot lanes were pinned, and at 16.5 we had the bodies (5v4) and still went 0-2.

c574a71e-39f1-4e74-9071-f7b4a9125761.quote: Khaimera jungle (1/4) — a 10-6 objective lead became 0 towers because the team fought the 13.8 and 16.5 losses a body short, with the offlane never joining. Set the next fight 5v5 and convert the lead into a tower.
c574a71e-39f1-4e74-9071-f7b4a9125761.issue: 16.5 was a 5v4 in our favor per the source
c574a71e-39f1-4e74-9071-f7b4a9125761.rewrite: Khaimera jungle (1/4) — a 10-6 objective lead became 0 towers: the offlane never joined the 13.8 and 16.5 fights, and the 16.5 was a 5v4 we still lost 0-2. Set the next fight up full-strength and convert the lead into a tower.

ed9dad02-dc71-45d8-92be-ffab9e57cc24.quote: Shinbi offlane was a favored matchup that Willy Guggenheim took over from 15 minutes on, but the spikes came late (Oathkeeper ~31m, Oblivion Crown ~37m) and the line went 3/7 — the deaths put Willy behind in a lane that should have been won, and the team lost the late Primes 0-for-3. Hold the won lane more patiently until those items land; the macro slipped late, but tighter offlane play keeps the team in it.
ed9dad02-dc71-45d8-92be-ffab9e57cc24.issue: 'late Primes 0-for-3' conflicts with the macro (we took Orb Prime in the 27.3 window and Primal in the 36.4 window)
ed9dad02-dc71-45d8-92be-ffab9e57cc24.rewrite: Shinbi offlane was a favored matchup that Willy Guggenheim took over, but the spikes came late (Oathkeeper ~31m, Oblivion Crown ~37m) and the line went 3/7 — and the macro flagged Willy alive-and-ahead but absent at the 13.6, 20.9, 27.3 and 36.4 fights; a shove-and-rotate there flips those numbers. Hold the won lane more patiently until the items land, then bring the lead to the fights.

f8507739-ef5a-464c-b3bd-01f2eb4bfd6f.rewrite: Aurora jungle, 13 assists — elite enabling that set up Sparrow's 17/4 game.

f8507739-ef5a-464c-b3bd-01f2eb4bfd6f.quote: Riktor support (15 assists) — heavy enabling that set up Cuban's 17/4 Sparrow to snowball into towers.

ff2e8123-c05a-4e78-93a9-a3733d273f09.quote: Phase support, 25 assists pocketing Cuban — exactly the enabling role; well played.
